title: Financial Connections data powered products
description: Collect an account to build data-powered products.

steps.title: Create an account holder
steps.description: By providing an email address, Financial Connections can optimize the authentication flow by dynamically showing a streamlined user interface, for returning Link users.

nodes.title: Create a new customer
nodes.description: Create a Customer object when users create an account with your business.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Create a Financial Connections session
steps.description: Before you can retrieve data from a user’s bank account with Financial Connections, your user must authenticate their account.

nodes.title: Create a Financial Connections session
nodes.description: Create a Financial Connections session to collect an account.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Collect a Financial Connections account
nodes.description: Use Stripe.js to collect a Financial Connections account. This method loads the authentication flow, the client-side Stripe.js UI that helps your users link their financial accounts to you and Stripe.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

steps.title: Retrieve Financial Connections account data
steps.description: After your user has successfully completed the authentication flow, access or refresh the account data you’ve specified in the permissions parameter of the Financial Connections Session.

nodes.title: Retrieve the Financial Connections session
nodes.description: Retrieve the completed Financial Connections session to see the accounts that your user has connected.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Retrieve Financial Connections account data
nodes.description: Retrieve account data that you requested permissions for in the Financial Connections Session. If you did not prefetch data, you may need to refresh the account.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Refresh Financial Connections account data
nodes.description: Refresh account data that you requested permissions for in the Financial Connections Session.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.
